message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.join (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series-level join via
fp_join::join_series:

- join_inner_overlap: 3-elem left, 3-elem right with 2 shared keys
- join_left_with_missing_right: left with 3 keys, right with 1
  matching key — verifies right-side null padding
- join_outer_disjoint: zero overlap, full outer union

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which uses
to_frame().merge(...) to produce the joined index + side values),
runs join_series through the JoinType matching the fixture, and
asserts parity via compare_join_expected. SeriesJoin was already
wired through the ResolvedExpected::Join branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-8nsod]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
